data.title: Washington To Obama: Rare Presidential Autograph Collection Could Fetch $500,000 At Auction
data.description: An auction is selling a lot of autographs from the first 43 presidents of the United States, an incredibly rare collection of American history.

data.title: Harris Clings To Narrow National Lead As Trump Gains Ground
data.description: Kamala Harris holds a slim lead over Donald Trump in a new 2024 election poll.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Luxury Is 'Going For A Critical Turnaround,' Tema ETF CEO Says
data.description: Luxury market at turning point, true luxury brands to outperform, aspirational brands face challenges. China stimulus may not boost demand.

data.title: Warren Buffett and Charlie Munger-Signed Business Card Was Estimated At $1,500 — But It Sold For A Lot More
data.description: Collectors continue to search for autographs of Warren Buffett and Charlie Munger. An item containing both signatures beat estimates at auction.

data.title: US Probe Into Potential Sanctions Breach By TSMC Threatens Apple's iPhone Chips Production
data.description: The U.S. Commerce Department has launched an investigation into TSMC for allegedly supplying chips to Huawei in violation of sanctions, which could disrupt the production of chips for Apple's iPhones and Macs if penalties are imposed.
